meta.title: Rizz Audition | Charm Stage
meta.description: 10 audition rounds with 3 judges scoring your charm. Discover your rizz level and appeal style!

app.title: Rizz Audition
app.subtitle: Step onto the stage. 3 judges. 10 rounds. Show your charm.
app.warning: For entertainment only. Not a real charm assessment.

r1.scenario: You arrive at a party and know absolutely no one. What's your power move?

choices.a: Slide into the liveliest group with a clever icebreaker
choices.b: Find a quiet corner, observe, then start a genuine conversation
choices.c: Head to the DJ and request a banger to get the crowd going

r2.scenario: Your crush sends you a vague text: 'What are you up to?'

choices.a: Reply 'I was just thinking about you. Telepathy?' — smooth and witty
choices.b: Honestly share what you're doing and ask 'How about you?' with genuine interest
choices.c: Send back 'Planning world domination. Want in?' — playful and funny

r3.scenario: Awkward silence hits during a first date. It's been 5+ seconds.

choices.a: Say 'If this silence feels comfortable, we might be soulmates' — clever save
choices.b: Look into their eyes and say 'Tell me more about what you mentioned earlier' — deep connection
choices.c: Point out 'We just sipped our drinks at the exact same time!' — comedy relief

r4.scenario: Someone at the next table is obviously hitting on your date right in front of you.

choices.a: Stay cool, smile confidently, and focus all your attention on your date
choices.b: Take your date's hand and say 'I'm really glad you're here with me'
choices.c: Glance at the admirer and joke 'Can't blame them for having good taste'

r5.scenario: At karaoke, the mic is handed to you. Everyone's watching expectantly.

choices.a: Nail a crowd-pleaser with confidence and stage presence
choices.b: Pick a meaningful song and pour your heart into an emotional performance
choices.c: Choose something ridiculous and do a hilarious comedy performance

r6.scenario: You're alone in an elevator with someone incredibly attractive. 30 seconds!

choices.a: Say 'Must be my lucky elevator day' and start a smooth conversation
choices.b: Make eye contact, smile warmly, and wish them a great day with sincerity
choices.c: Ask 'Is there a hidden camera? This feels like a scene from a movie'

r7.scenario: Your friend starts telling an embarrassing story about you at a group gathering.

choices.a: Jump in with 'Oh, but you haven't heard the real plot twist' and flip the narrative
choices.b: Own it honestly and say 'Yeah, I learned a lot from that experience'
choices.c: Exaggerate the story even more and turn it into a hilarious self-roast

r8.scenario: You got caught staring at someone attractive. Your eyes meet!

choices.a: Don't look away — smile confidently and give a subtle nod
choices.b: Walk over and say 'Sorry, you had such good energy I couldn't help but notice'
choices.c: Do a dramatic double-take and say 'Oh! I thought you were a celebrity!'

r9.scenario: A rival is aggressively flirting with the person you like.

choices.a: Stay unbothered and show your charm at your own pace
choices.b: Connect with your person through genuine, deep conversation
choices.c: Befriend the rival and suggest 'Hey, let's all hang out!' — unexpected move

r10.scenario: Final round! The decisive moment to tell someone how you feel.

choices.a: Use a brilliant metaphor to confess in the most clever way possible
choices.b: Look them in the eyes and speak from the heart with raw honesty
choices.c: Make them laugh AND cry with a confession that's funny yet deeply touching

superstar.name: Superstar
superstar.description: Born for the stage! You captivate every judge with overwhelming charm. You naturally command any room and draw people in like a magnet. Your social instincts are extraordinary.
tips: Humility is the ultimate charm multiplier — shine without blinding
Share the spotlight — help others feel confident too
Stay authentic — your greatest charm is being genuine

headliner.name: Headliner
headliner.description: Main stage material! You leave strong impressions and handle most situations with charm and grace. With a little more polish, you'll reach legendary status.
tips: Showing vulnerability is attractive too — it's okay not to be perfect
Listen more to what others are really saying
Don't hesitate to make the first move in new situations

contender.name: Contender
contender.description: A challenger full of potential! You create great moments and your charm explodes once you're comfortable. Build more confidence and you'll own the stage.
tips: Stack small wins — start one conversation a day with someone new
Practice body language: eye contact, open posture, genuine smiles
Don't fear rejection — every attempt is experience gained

rookie.name: Rookie
rookie.description: Just stepped on stage! You have raw charm potential that's still being refined. With more experience, you'll grow fast and surprise everyone.
tips: Study charismatic people — observe what makes them magnetic
Practice solo — check your smile and posture in the mirror
Start with small talk — say one extra thing to your barista today

wallflower.name: Wallflower
wallflower.description: The quiet observer! You shine backstage. Your deep inner charm takes time to reveal, but you leave profound impressions on the few who get close.
tips: Your quiet charm is valuable — own it
Leverage your strength in one-on-one situations
Expand your comfort zone gradually — one small challenge daily

appealStyles.witty: Witty Charmer — Master of Timing & Cleverness
appealStyles.deep: Deep Charmer — Power of Sincerity & Depth
appealStyles.funny: Humor Charmer — Winning Hearts Through Laughter

result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants got this rizz level

witty.title: Pair Your Rizz With EQ Test
witty.desc: You already know how to land the line. Now see if your emotional timing keeps the chemistry going.

deep.title: Take Your Charm Into Attachment Style
deep.desc: Your pull comes from depth. See how your connection style shapes real relationships.

funny.title: Turn Chemistry Into MBTI Love
funny.desc: You win people over with fun energy. See which MBTI love dynamic fits your flirting style.

share.text: Rizz Audition: {score}/100 — {level}! What's your charm level?
